/usr/bin/cc -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Wwrite-strings -Wjump-misses-init -Wstringop-truncation -Wmissing-include-dirs -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/stack_direction.dir/cmake/stack_direction.c.o -o runtime_output_directory/stack_direction
